From the Official Tezuka Productions Channel — Unofficial Fan Archive

Tezuka OSAMU Library

Aesthetic, Strange, and Philosophical

Ⅰ. SF, AI & The Human Soul Ⅱ. Dark Romance & Love for the Grotesque Ⅲ. Noir & Twisted Whims Ⅳ. For the Earth & All Living Things

Now that AI has become reality, one artist predicted it all decades ago.
Life alongside robots. Love for the grotesque. The darkness of human nature. And a prayer for the earth.
The short works of Tezuka Osamu speak to us once more — quietly, from across the years.

Chapter Ⅰ
Chapter Ⅰ

SF, AI & The Human Soul

Prophecies written decades before AI became reality — resonating more urgently with every passing year.
Welcome to the intellectual, philosophical world of Tezuka's science fiction.

Tezuka Productions Official Channel

SFAIPsychology

Haetатаki — The Fly Swatter

A world where every household has a domestic robot. A story of marriage — read in the age of AI.

We recommend listening to the original Japanese audio while using YouTube's 'Auto-translate' subtitle feature — to feel the full literary atmosphere of the original.

Tezuka Productions Official Channel

SFCosmicHumanist

W3 — Wonder Three

When aliens arrive to assess the earth, what do they make of humanity? The truth about this planet — as seen by three visitors disguised as animals.

We recommend listening to the original Japanese audio while using YouTube's 'Auto-translate' subtitle feature — to feel the full literary atmosphere of the original.

Chapter Ⅱ
Chapter Ⅱ

Dark Romance & Love for the Grotesque

Love that crosses every boundary of the human form.
Romance with the grotesque, obsession, and bittersweet tragedy.

Tezuka Productions Official Channel

AestheticMadnessObsession

Balbora

A brilliant writer meets a filthy, mysterious girl on the street. A decadent story of madness, art, and love.

We recommend listening to the original Japanese audio while using YouTube's 'Auto-translate' subtitle feature — to feel the full literary atmosphere of the original.

Tezuka Productions Official Channel

MedicalGrotesqueHorror

Fukuro — The Sac

What if someone else were living inside your body? A medical horror short story.

We recommend listening to the original Japanese audio while using YouTube's 'Auto-translate' subtitle feature — to feel the full literary atmosphere of the original.

Tezuka Productions Official Channel

GrotesqueDesertFarewell

Sareba Ārī — Farewell, Ārī

A girl with the ears of a wildcat, encountered in the desert. Neither fully human nor beast — a fragile, dangerous farewell.

We recommend listening to the original Japanese audio while using YouTube's 'Auto-translate' subtitle feature — to feel the full literary atmosphere of the original.

Tezuka Productions Official Channel

ControversialEvilObsession

MW

Every form of evil embodied in one beautiful man. Love and hatred, the sacred and the sinful intertwined — Tezuka's most controversial work.

We recommend listening to the original Japanese audio while using YouTube's 'Auto-translate' subtitle feature — to feel the full literary atmosphere of the original.

Tezuka Productions Official Channel

SecretNightMystery

Yoru no Koe — Voice in the Night

The Prince and the Pauper — for adults.

We recommend listening to the original Japanese audio while using YouTube's 'Auto-translate' subtitle feature — to feel the full literary atmosphere of the original.

Tezuka Productions Official Channel

Love & CurseReincarnationObsession

Apollo's Song

A man cursed never to love, who returns again and again across lifetimes in search of it. A story of obsession and fate that transcends time.

We recommend listening to the original Japanese audio while using YouTube's 'Auto-translate' subtitle feature — to feel the full literary atmosphere of the original.

Chapter Ⅲ
Chapter Ⅲ

Noir & Twisted Whims

Dark fables for adults.
A world of twisted human desire and strangely absurd fate.

Tezuka Productions Official Channel

AbsurdBlack HumorHuman Folly

Yarō to Dangai — The Cliff

A cliff known as the Cliff of Delusion. An escaped convict barricades himself in its cave, holding a hostage.

We recommend listening to the original Japanese audio while using YouTube's 'Auto-translate' subtitle feature — to feel the full literary atmosphere of the original.

Tezuka Productions Official Channel

Period DramaRevengeNoir

Mogami-dono Shimatsu — The Lord's Double

A peasant forced to serve as his lord's body double plots his revenge. The revenge succeeds — but...

We recommend listening to the original Japanese audio while using YouTube's 'Auto-translate' subtitle feature — to feel the full literary atmosphere of the original.

Tezuka Productions Official Channel

PsychologicalMemorySuspense

Rakuban — Cave-in

Memory always lies. A quiet psychological duel between two men, played out in a sealed room.

We recommend listening to the original Japanese audio while using YouTube's 'Auto-translate' subtitle feature — to feel the full literary atmosphere of the original.

Tezuka Productions Official Channel

MysteryBaseballThe Price

The Blue Shadow at the Backstop

A mysterious drug that reveals a "blue shadow" — follow its guidance, and success will follow. But every drug has its price.

We recommend listening to the original Japanese audio while using YouTube's 'Auto-translate' subtitle feature — to feel the full literary atmosphere of the original.

Tezuka Productions Official Channel

Black HumorFlash FictionShocking

Tako no Ashi — Octopus Legs

Seven minutes. That is all it takes to leave a lasting wound. A merciless flash story by Tezuka Osamu — black humour at its darkest.

We recommend listening to the original Japanese audio while using YouTube's 'Auto-translate' subtitle feature — to feel the full literary atmosphere of the original.

Tezuka Productions Official Channel

NightAbsurdShort Story

Bypass no Yoru — Night on the Bypass

A bypass road at midnight. A strange encounter in the lightless dark.

We recommend listening to the original Japanese audio while using YouTube's 'Auto-translate' subtitle feature — to feel the full literary atmosphere of the original.

Chapter Ⅳ
Chapter Ⅳ

For the Earth & All Living Things

Tezuka Osamu — who spent a lifetime drawing his love for the earth, his longing for peace, and the preciousness of life.

Tezuka Productions Official Channel

HumanistLife

Korosuke's Bridge

A friendship between a boy and a wild deer. On living alongside nature.

We recommend listening to the original Japanese audio while using YouTube's 'Auto-translate' subtitle feature — to feel the full literary atmosphere of the original.

Tezuka Productions Official Channel

WarPeaceAutobiographical

Kami no Toride — Paper Fortress

Tezuka Osamu's own wartime childhood, drawn from memory.

We recommend listening to the original Japanese audio while using YouTube's 'Auto-translate' subtitle feature — to feel the full literary atmosphere of the original.

This is an unofficial fan archive created to introduce the works of Tezuka Osamu to Japanese-language learners around the world.

The creator of this site has no affiliation with Tezuka Productions.

All videos featured here belong to the official Tezuka Productions YouTube channel.
